sentences.sentence: Trays are stacked near the entrance.
The salad bar opens at noon.
Please return your dishes here.
Hot meals are served at the front counter every day.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress placement in compound noun (front counter)

sentences.sentence: You can refill your drink at any beverage station.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress placement in compound noun (beverage station)

sentences.sentence: Vegetarian options are included with the standard meal plan.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking between words (are_included); compound noun (meal plan)

sentences.sentence: If you cannot find a particular dish, check the menu board posted near the main serving line.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause with wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: conditional intonation pattern (rising if-clause, falling main clause); linked speech across clause boundary

sentences.sentence: Resume templates are available online.
The interview room is down the hall.
Sign up for a mock interview.
Career advisors can review your cover letter in person.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress placement in compound nouns (career advisors, cover letter)

sentences.sentence: Workshops on networking are held every Wednesday afternoon.
Job listings can be accessed from any office computer.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking between words (can_be_accessed); compound noun (office computer)

sentences.sentence: If you want feedback on your application, bring a printed copy to your scheduled meeting.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause with wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundary; reduced function words in rapid sequence (to your)

sentences.sentence: Rental contracts are signed at this counter.
The parking lot is behind the building.
Please inspect the vehicle before leaving.
Insurance coverage is included with every daily rate.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking between words (is_included); compound noun (insurance coverage)

sentences.sentence: You can return the car to any branch location.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress placement in compound noun (branch location)

sentences.sentence: Comfortable seating is available in all our vehicles.
If you are unsure about the return process, check the details listed on your rental agreement.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause with wayfinding pointer
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced function words in rapid sequence (about the); final consonant clusters at phrase boundaries (details, agreement)
